mapper.select: select case when count(1) > 0 then true else false end from scene_tag where tag_id = #{tagId}

select count(1) from scene where pinned = false
and name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')

select st.scene_id as sceneId, t.id as tagId, t.name, t.color from tag t join scene_tag st on t.id = st.tag_id where st.scene_id in
#{id}
